steps.step: Full API test suite — 99 tests, 0 failures (was 84, +15 new STAFF-004 tests)
steps.notes: 12 test files, 99 tests passed, 0 failures. Duration 20.55s

steps.step: AC-1: GET /api/staff/products — absent bpa row → isAvailable: true
steps.notes: LEFT JOIN COALESCE: null bpa.is_available → true. basePrice is string type confirmed.

steps.step: AC-2: toggle off → product absent from customer INNER JOIN menu
steps.notes: PATCH isAvailable:false → bpa row upserted with is_available=false → customer GET /branches/:id/menu excludes product

steps.step: AC-3: toggle on → product restored to customer menu
steps.notes: PATCH isAvailable:true → bpa row upserted with is_available=true → customer menu includes product

steps.step: AC-4: branch isolation — staff2 PATCH only affects branch2 scope
steps.notes: Branch always session-derived. Staff2 marking product unavailable at branch2 does not affect branch1 customer menu.
orders.ts already checks branch.is_accepting_pickup and throws 400 OrderError. Test accepts 400 or 401.

steps.step: AC-6/AC-7: GET /api/staff/branch reflects updated values after PATCH
steps.notes: Re-select after update ensures response reflects DB state

steps.step: AC-8: branch isolation — staff2 PATCH /branch only affects branch2
steps.notes: branch always session-derived; cross-branch mutation is structurally impossible
Zod .refine() enforces at least one field present
